sections.paragraph:
μεταξύ [μετά, ξύν (σύν)] between, as marker noting a point at which one entity is separate fr. another

—a. temporally, as adv. ἐν τῷ μετάξυ = meanwhile, i.e. between two periods of time J 4:31; μ. = following/next, as marking anticipation of still another sabbath Ac 13:42.

—b. spatially, as prep. Mt 23:35; Lk 11:51; 16:26; Ac 12:6.

—c. socially, as prep. Mt 18:15; Ac 15:9; of entities at odds with one another Ro 2:15 (here μ. may also be rendered among).
